name: Crisp Fried Noodles and Chilli Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the coriander and chili. Dice the garlic.
2. Cut the peppers, carrot into fine strips.
3. Drain the mushrooms and corn. Cut the onion into thin wedges.
4. Deep fry the Chinese vermicelli in hot oil. Drain on absorbent paper.
5. Place on a large serving plate and keep warm.
6. Heat the teaspoon of oil in a large pan. Add the ginger, coriander and garlic.
7. Cook for 2 minutes. Add onion, red and green peppers, carrot. Stir fry for 3 minutes.
8. Add the corn, mushrooms, soy sauce, vinegar, brown sugar, and chili.
9. Stir to combine and cook over high heat for 3 minutes.
10. Spoon the vegetables over the noodles, pour any remaining sauce.
11. Garnish with coriander leaves and serve.
